li.xpath: Defs/HediffDef[defName="LTS_ModularBionicArm" or defName="LTS_ModularBionicEye" or defName="LTS_ModularBionicJaw" or defName="LTS_ModularBionicKidney" or defName="LTS_ModularBionicLeg" or defName="LTS_ModularBionicLung" or defName="LTS_ModularBionicNose" or defName="LTS_ModularBionicSpine" or defName="LTS_ModularBionicStomach"]/comps/li[@Class="EBSGFramework.HediffCompProperties_Modular"]/slots/li/capacity

Defs/HediffDef[defName="LTS_ModularArchotechArm" or defName="LTS_ModularArchotechEye" or defName="LTS_ModularArchotechJaw" or defName="LTS_ModularArchotechKidney" or defName="LTS_ModularArchotechLeg" or defName="LTS_ModularArchotechLung" or defName="LTS_ModularArchotechNose" or defName="LTS_ModularArchotechSpine" or defName="LTS_ModularArchotechStomach"]/comps/li[@Class="EBSGFramework.HediffCompProperties_Modular"]/slots/li/capacity
